## Description
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

## Expected Behaviour
What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behaviour
What actually happened. Include any error messages, HTTP status codes, or console output.

## Screenshots / Recordings
If applicable, add screenshots or a screen recording to help explain the problem.

## Environment
- Browser & version:
- OS:
- Page / feature affected:

## Additional Context
Any other context about the problem.
